message:
🌱 Add sops: creation_rules from can't be matched when encrypting from stdin mission (#840)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "sops-594-creation-rules-from-can-t-be-matched-when-encrypting-from-stdin",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "sops: creation_rules from can't be matched when encrypting from stdin ",
+    "description": "creation_rules from can't be matched when encrypting from stdin . Requested by 6+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current sops setup",
+        "description": "Verify your sops version and configuration:\n```bash\nsops --version\n```\nThis feature requires sops v3.8.0+ which includes the `--filename-override` flag."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review sops configuration",
+        "description": "Review the relevant sops configuration:\nGiven a project with the following structure:\n```\n.\n\u251c\u2500\u2500 .sops.yaml\n\u2514\u2500\u2500 secrets\n    \u2514\u2500\u2500 test.json\n```\n\nWith `.sops.yaml` content:\n```yaml\ncreation_rules:\n  - path_regex: secrets/.*\n    gcp_kms: projects/my-project/locations/global/keyRings/my-key-ring/cryptoKeys/my-key\n```\n\nWhen encrypting from stdin, sops cannot match creation rules because `/dev/stdin` does not match any `path_regex` pattern."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for creation_rules from can't be matched when encrypting from\u2026",
+        "description": "The fix adds a `--filename-override` parameter for use when providing data via stdin.\n\nExample usage:\n```bash\necho 'foo: bar' | sops --encrypt --filename-override secrets/test.yaml /dev/stdin\n```\n\nThis tells sops to act as if `secrets/test.yaml` was supplied instead of `/dev/stdin`, allowing creation rules with `path_regex` to match correctly.\n\nSee the fix PR for details: https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1332"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the `--filename-override` flag works correctly:\n```bash\n# Encrypt from stdin using filename override to match creation rules\necho '{\"secret\": \"value\"}' | sops --encrypt --filename-override secrets/test.json /dev/stdin\n\n# Verify that creation rules are matched correctly\necho 'key: value' | sops --encrypt --filename-override secrets/test.yaml /dev/stdin\n```\nConfirm that the correct KMS key from `.sops.yaml` creation rules is used for encryption."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This adds a `--filename-override` parameter which can be used when providing data to encrypt (or decrypt) from `/dev/stdin`.\n\nFor example: `echo 'foo: bar' | ~/go/bin/sops --encrypt --filename-override foobar.yaml /dev/stdin` will take the data to encrypt from the `echo` command's output, and act as if `foobar.yaml` has been supplied instead of `/dev/stdin`.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "sops",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "sops"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/getsops/sops/issues/594",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/getsops/sops/pull/1332"
+    },

+  },
